query:
You are working on the ankidroid/Anki-Android repository.
The codebase is at version 2.16 (commit: a8117a0a).

## Issue to Resolve

Request to make "Reschedule" as one of the command mapping controller button options
     Is it possible to make "Reschedule" as one of the command mapping controller button options? I would like to be able to reschedule a card to a different date as needed with a touch of a gesture or button on a game controller without having to tap multiple times to reach the "Reschedule for review in x days"  option for a specific card. 
     Simply put, I would like to be able to do a certain gesture or click a single button to reach the "Reschedule" option like we can do for "Bury card", "Undo", etc. Please let me know if there's already a way to do this! Thank you all so much!!

## Additional Context from Issue Discussion

Yes, it is possible. Pretty valid feature request
Oh, that's awesome! Thank you so much!
Hi, I would like to work on this feature request! And if I can work, is the way to solve it is just segregate the 2 options which are in reschedule tab to the main tab?
Hello @parthn2. We appreciate the work.

For now, there is no need to do a command for `Reset progress`. Just the `Reschedule` command asked by the OP is enough
> Hello @parthn2. We appreciate the work.
> 
> For now, there is no need to do a command for `Reset progress`. Just the `Reschedule` command asked by the OP is enough

Okay!! But wouldn't it just make it useless to go 2 clicks for 'Reset' because no one will be using 2 clicks for 'Reschedule' because it is just one click away. So why not break that into 2 if it is the correct thing?
> because no one will be using 2 clicks for 'Reschedule' because it is just one click away.

Not everybody is going to add a gesture for Reschedule, so it may be still be a 2 taps action.

## Relevant Files

The following files are likely relevant to solving this issue:
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/Reviewer.kt`
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/analytics/UsageAnalytics.kt`
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/cardviewer/ViewerCommand.kt`

## Instructions

Please analyze this issue and implement a fix. Make the necessary code changes to resolve the problem described above.

Focus on:
- Understanding the root cause of the issue
- Making minimal, targeted changes to fix the problem
- Ensuring your changes don't break existing functionality

## Important Evaluation Notes

**Your work will be evaluated by running hidden tests that you do not have access to.** These tests will verify that your fix correctly addresses the issue. You should be confident in your solution before finishing.
**If you write tests to verify your changes, create them in NEW test files only** - do NOT modify existing test files

## CRITICAL RESTRICTIONS

**NEVER use git commands.** Do not run `git status`, `git diff`, `git checkout`, `git reset`, or ANY other git commands. Using git will corrupt the evaluation environment and invalidate your entire submission. All file operations should be done through normal file editing and reading tools, not git.

 194‚Üí        get() {

 199‚Üí            val shownAsToolbarButton = mActionButtons.findMenuItem(ActionButtons.RES_FLAG)?.isActionButton == true
 200‚Üí            return if (shownAsToolbarButton && !mPrefFullscreenReview) {
 201‚Üí                CardMarker.FLAG_NONE
 202‚Üí            } else {
 203‚Üí                actualValue
 204‚Üí            }
 205‚Üí        }

 215‚Üí    override fun shouldDisplayMark(): Boolean {
 216‚Üí        val markValue = super.shouldDisplayMark()
 217‚Üí        if (!markValue) {
 218‚Üí            return false
 219‚Üí        }
 220‚Üí
 221‚Üí        // If we don't know: assume it's not shown
 222‚Üí        val shownAsToolbarButton = mActionButtons.findMenuItem(ActionButtons.RES_MARK)?.isActionButton == true
 223‚Üí        return !shownAsToolbarButton || mPrefFullscreenReview
 224‚Üí    }
 225‚Üí
 226‚Üí    protected open fun onMark(card: Card?) {
 227‚Üí        if (card == null) {
 228‚Üí            return
 229‚Üí        }
 230‚Üí        launchCatchingTask {
 231‚Üí            toggleMark(card.note())
 232‚Üí            refreshActionBar()
 233‚Üí            onMarkChanged()
 234‚Üí        }
 235‚Üí    }
 236‚Üí
 237‚Üí    private fun onMarkChanged() {
 238‚Üí        if (currentCard == null) {
 239‚Üí            return
 240‚Üí        }
 241‚Üí        mCardMarker!!.displayMark(shouldDisplayMark())
 242‚Üí    }
 243‚Üí
 244‚Üí    protected open fun onFlag(card: Card?, flag: Int) {
 245‚Üí        if (card == null) {
 246‚Üí            return
 247‚Üí        }
 248‚Üí        launchCatchingTask {
 249‚Üí            card.setUserFlag(flag)
 250‚Üí            if (BackendFactory.defaultLegacySchema) {
 251‚Üí                card.flush()
 252‚Üí                /* Following code would allow to update value of {{cardFlag}}.
 253‚Üí               Anki does not update this value when a flag is changed, so
 254‚Üí               currently this code would do something that anki itself
 255‚Üí               does not do. I hope in the future Anki will correct that
 256‚Üí               and this code may becomes useful.
 257‚Üí
 258‚Üí            card._getQA(true); //force reload. Useful iff {{cardFlag}} occurs in the template
 259‚Üí            if (sDisplayAnswer) {
 260‚Üí                displayCardAnswer();
 261‚Üí            } else {
 262‚Üí                displayCardQuestion();
 263‚Üí                } */
 264‚Üí            } else {
 265‚Üí                withCol {
 266‚Üí                    newBackend.setUserFlagForCards(listOf(card.id), flag)
 267‚Üí                }
 268‚Üí            }
 269‚Üí            refreshActionBar()
 270‚Üí            onFlagChanged()
 271‚Üí        }
 272‚Üí    }
 273‚Üí
 274‚Üí    private fun onFlagChanged() {
 275‚Üí        if (currentCard == null) {
 276‚Üí            return
 277‚Üí        }
 278‚Üí        mCardMarker!!.displayFlag(flagToDisplay)
 279‚Üí    }

 281‚Üí    private fun selectDeckFromExtra() {
 282‚Üí        val extras = intent.extras
 283‚Üí        if (extras == null || !extras.containsKey("deckId")) {
 284‚Üí            // deckId is not set, load default
 285‚Üí            return
 286‚Üí        }
 287‚Üí        val did = extras.getLong("deckId", Long.MIN_VALUE)
 288‚Üí        Timber.d("selectDeckFromExtra() with deckId = %d", did)
 289‚Üí
 290‚Üí        // deckId does not exist, load default
 291‚Üí        if (col.decks.get(did, _default = false) == null) {
 292‚Üí            Timber.w("selectDeckFromExtra() deckId '%d' doesn't exist", did)
 293‚Üí            return
 294‚Üí        }
 295‚Üí
 296‚Üí        // Clear the undo history when selecting a new deck
 297‚Üí        if (col.decks.selected() != did) {
 298‚Üí            col.clearUndo()
 299‚Üí        }
 300‚Üí        // Select the deck
 301‚Üí        col.decks.select(did)
 302‚Üí        // Reset the schedule so that we get the counts for the currently selected deck
 303‚Üí        col.sched.deferReset()
 304‚Üí    }
 305‚Üí
 306‚Üí    override fun getContentViewAttr(fullscreenMode: FullScreenMode): Int {
 307‚Üí        return when (fullscreenMode) {
 308‚Üí            FullScreenMode.BUTTONS_ONLY -> R.layout.reviewer_fullscreen
 309‚Üí            FullScreenMode.FULLSCREEN_ALL_GONE -> R.layout.reviewer_fullscreen_noanswers
 310‚Üí            else -> R.layout.reviewer
 311‚Üí        }
 312‚Üí    }
 313‚Üí
 314‚Üí    public override fun fitsSystemWindows(): Boolean {
 315‚Üí        return !fullscreenMode.isFullScreenReview()
 316‚Üí    }
 317‚Üí
 318‚Üí    override fun onCollectionLoaded(col: Collection) {
 319‚Üí        super.onCollectionLoaded(col)
 320‚Üí        if (Intent.ACTION_VIEW == intent.action) {
 321‚Üí            Timber.d("onCreate() :: received Intent with action = %s", intent.action)
 322‚Üí            selectDeckFromExtra()
 323‚Üí        }
 324‚Üí        // Load the first card and start reviewing. Uses the answer card
 325‚Üí        // task to load a card, but since we send null
 326‚Üí        // as the card to answer, no card will be answered.
 327‚Üí        prefWhiteboard = MetaDB.getWhiteboardState(this, parentDid)
 328‚Üí        if (prefWhiteboard) {
 329‚Üí            // DEFECT: Slight inefficiency here, as we set the database using these methods
 330‚Üí            val whiteboardVisibility = MetaDB.getWhiteboardVisibility(this, parentDid)
 331‚Üí            setWhiteboardEnabledState(true)
 332‚Üí            setWhiteboardVisibility(whiteboardVisibility)
 333‚Üí            toggleStylus = MetaDB.getWhiteboardStylusState(this, parentDid)
 334‚Üí            whiteboard!!.toggleStylus = toggleStylus
 335‚Üí        }
 336‚Üí        col.sched.deferReset() // Reset schedule in case card was previously loaded
 337‚Üí        col.startTimebox()
 338‚Üí        GetCard().runWithHandler(answerCardHandler(false))
 339‚Üí        disableDrawerSwipeOnConflicts()
 340‚Üí        // Add a weak reference to current activity so that scheduler can talk to to Activity
 341‚Üí        sched!!.setContext(WeakReference(this))
 342‚Üí
 343‚Üí        // Set full screen/immersive mode if needed
 344‚Üí        if (mPrefFullscreenReview) {
 345‚Üí            setFullScreen(this)
 346‚Üí        }
 347‚Üí        setRenderWorkaround(this)
 348‚Üí    }
 349‚Üí
 350‚Üí    override fun onOptionsItemSelected(item: MenuItem): Boolean {
 351‚Üí        // 100ms was not enough on my device (Honor 9 Lite -  Android Pie)
 352‚Üí        delayedHide(1000)
 353‚Üí        if (drawerToggle.onOptionsItemSelected(item)) {
 354‚Üí            return true
 355‚Üí        }
 356‚Üí        when (item.itemId) {

 577‚Üí        audioView?.notifyStopRecord()
 578‚Üí
 579‚Üí        // Remove the temporary audio file
 580‚Üí        tempAudioPath?.let {
 581‚Üí            val tempAudioPathToDelete = File(it)
 582‚Üí            if (tempAudioPathToDelete.exists()) {
 583‚Üí                tempAudioPathToDelete.delete()

 586‚Üí        super.closeReviewer(result, saveDeck)

 589‚Üí    /**
 590‚Üí     *
 591‚Üí     * @return Whether the mic toolbar is usable
 592‚Üí     */
 593‚Üí    @VisibleForTesting
 594‚Üí    fun openMicToolbar(): Boolean {
 595‚Üí        if (audioView == null || audioView!!.visibility != View.VISIBLE) {
 596‚Üí            openOrToggleMicToolbar()
 597‚Üí        }
 598‚Üí        return audioView != null
 599‚Üí    }

 601‚Üí    private fun openOrToggleMicToolbar() {
 602‚Üí        if (!canRecordAudio(this)) {
 603‚Üí            ActivityCompat.requestPermissions(
 604‚Üí                this,
 605‚Üí                arrayOf(Manifest.permission.RECORD_AUDIO),
 606‚Üí                REQUEST_AUDIO_PERMISSION
 607‚Üí            )
 608‚Üí        } else {
 609‚Üí            toggleMicToolBar()
 610‚Üí        }
 611‚Üí    }
 612‚Üí
 613‚Üí    private fun toggleMicToolBar() {
 614‚Üí        audioView?.let {
 615‚Üí            it.visibility = if (it.visibility != View.VISIBLE) View.VISIBLE else View.GONE
 616‚Üí            return
 617‚Üí        }
 618‚Üí        // Record mic tool bar does not exist yet
 619‚Üí        tempAudioPath = generateTempAudioFile(this)
 620‚Üí        if (tempAudioPath == null) {
 621‚Üí            return
 622‚Üí        }
 623‚Üí        audioView = createRecorderInstance(
 624‚Üí            this,
 625‚Üí            R.drawable.ic_play_arrow_white_24dp,
 626‚Üí            R.drawable.ic_pause_white_24dp,
 627‚Üí            R.drawable.ic_stop_white_24dp,
 628‚Üí            R.drawable.ic_rec,
 629‚Üí            R.drawable.ic_rec_stop,
 630‚Üí            tempAudioPath!!
 631‚Üí        )
 632‚Üí        if (audioView == null) {
 633‚Üí            tempAudioPath = null
 634‚Üí            return
 635‚Üí        }
 636‚Üí        val lp2 = FrameLayout.LayoutParams(
 637‚Üí            ViewGroup.LayoutParams.MATCH_PARENT,
 638‚Üí            ViewGroup.LayoutParams.MATCH_PARENT
 639‚Üí        )
 640‚Üí        audioView!!.layoutParams = lp2
 641‚Üí        val micToolBarLayer = findViewById<LinearLayout>(R.id.mic_tool_bar_layer)
 642‚Üí        micToolBarLayer.addView(audioView)
 643‚Üí    }

 645‚Üí    override fun onRequestPermissionsResult(requestCode: Int, permissions: Array<String>, grantResults: IntArray) {
 646‚Üí        super.onRequestPermissionsResult(requestCode, permissions, grantResults)
 647‚Üí        if (requestCode == REQUEST_AUDIO_PERMISSION &&
 648‚Üí            permissions.isNotEmpty() && grantResults[0] == PackageManager.PERMISSION_GRANTED
 649‚Üí        ) {
 650‚Üí            // Get get audio record permission, so we can create the record tool bar
 651‚Üí            toggleMicToolBar()
 652‚Üí        }
 653‚Üí    }

 685‚Üí        intent.putExtra(NoteEditor.EXTRA_CALLER, NoteEditor.CALLER_REVIEWER_ADD)

 687‚Üí        startActivityForResultWithAnimation(intent, ADD_NOTE, animation)

 708‚Üí    // Related to https://github.com/ankidroid/Anki-Android/pull/11061#issuecomment-1107868455
 709‚Üí    @NeedsTest("Order of operations needs Testing around Menu (Overflow) Icons and their colors.")
 710‚Üí    override fun onCreateOptionsMenu(menu: Menu): Boolean {
 711‚Üí        Timber.d("onCreateOptionsMenu()")
 712‚Üí        // NOTE: This is called every time a new question is shown via invalidate options menu
 713‚Üí        menuInflater.inflate(R.menu.reviewer, menu)
 714‚Üí        displayIcons(menu)
 715‚Üí        mActionButtons.setCustomButtonsStatus(menu)
 716‚Üí        var alpha = if (super.controlBlocked !== ReviewerUi.ControlBlock.SLOW) Themes.ALPHA_ICON_ENABLED_LIGHT else Themes.ALPHA_ICON_DISABLED_LIGHT
 717‚Üí        val markCardIcon = menu.findItem(R.id.action_mark_card)
 718‚Üí        if (currentCard != null && isMarked(currentCard!!.note())) {
 719‚Üí            markCardIcon.setTitle(R.string.menu_unmark_note).setIcon(R.drawable.ic_star_white)
 720‚Üí        } else {
 721‚Üí            markCardIcon.setTitle(R.string.menu_mark_note).setIcon(R.drawable.ic_star_border_white)
 722‚Üí        }
 723‚Üí        markCardIcon.iconAlpha = alpha
 724‚Üí
 725‚Üí        val flagIcon = menu.findItem(R.id.action_flag)
 726‚Üí        if (flagIcon != null) {
 727‚Üí            if (currentCard != null) {
 728‚Üí                when (currentCard!!.userFlag()) {
 729‚Üí                    1 -> flagIcon.setIcon(R.drawable.ic_flag_red)
 730‚Üí                    2 -> flagIcon.setIcon(R.drawable.ic_flag_orange)
 731‚Üí                    3 -> flagIcon.setIcon(R.drawable.ic_flag_green)
 732‚Üí                    4 -> flagIcon.setIcon(R.drawable.ic_flag_blue)
 733‚Üí                    5 -> flagIcon.setIcon(R.drawable.ic_flag_pink)
 734‚Üí                    6 -> flagIcon.setIcon(R.drawable.ic_flag_turquoise)
 735‚Üí                    7 -> flagIcon.setIcon(R.drawable.ic_flag_purple)
 736‚Üí                    else -> flagIcon.setIcon(R.drawable.ic_flag_transparent)
 737‚Üí                }
 738‚Üí            }
 739‚Üí            flagIcon.iconAlpha = alpha
 740‚Üí        }
 741‚Üí
 742‚Üí        // Undo button
 743‚Üí        @DrawableRes val undoIconId: Int
 744‚Üí        val undoEnabled: Boolean
 745‚Üí        val whiteboardIsShownAndHasStrokes = mShowWhiteboard && whiteboard?.undoEmpty() == false
 746‚Üí        if (whiteboardIsShownAndHasStrokes) {
 747‚Üí            undoIconId = R.drawable.eraser
 748‚Üí            undoEnabled = true
 749‚Üí        } else {
 750‚Üí            undoIconId = R.drawable.ic_undo_white
 751‚Üí            undoEnabled = colIsOpen() && col.undoAvailable()
 752‚Üí        }
 753‚Üí        val alphaUndo = if (undoEnabled && super.controlBlocked !== ReviewerUi.ControlBlock.SLOW) Themes.ALPHA_ICON_ENABLED_LIGHT else Themes.ALPHA_ICON_DISABLED_LIGHT
 754‚Üí        val undoIcon = menu.findItem(R.id.action_undo)
 755‚Üí        undoIcon.setIcon(undoIconId)
 756‚Üí        undoIcon.setEnabled(undoEnabled).iconAlpha = alphaUndo
 757‚Üí        undoIcon.actionView!!.isEnabled = undoEnabled
 758‚Üí        if (colIsOpen()) { // Required mostly because there are tests where `col` is null
 759‚Üí            if (whiteboardIsShownAndHasStrokes) {
 760‚Üí                undoIcon.title = resources.getString(R.string.undo_action_whiteboard_last_stroke)
 761‚Üí            } else if (col.undoAvailable()) {
 762‚Üí                undoIcon.title = resources.getString(R.string.studyoptions_congrats_undo, col.undoName(resources))
 763‚Üí                //  e.g. Undo Bury, Undo Change Deck, Undo Update Note
 764‚Üí            } else {
 765‚Üí                // In this case, there is no object word for the verb, "Undo",
 766‚Üí                // so in some languages such as Japanese, which have pre/post-positional particle with the object,
 767‚Üí                // we need to use the string for just "Undo" instead of the string for "Undo %s".
 768‚Üí                undoIcon.title = resources.getString(R.string.undo)
 769‚Üí            }
 770‚Üí        }
 771‚Üí        if (undoEnabled) {
 772‚Üí            mOnboarding.onUndoButtonEnabled()
 773‚Üí        }
 774‚Üí        val toggleWhiteboardIcon = menu.findItem(R.id.action_toggle_whiteboard)
 775‚Üí        val toggleStylusIcon = menu.findItem(R.id.action_toggle_stylus)
 776‚Üí        val hideWhiteboardIcon = menu.findItem(R.id.action_hide_whiteboard)
 777‚Üí        val changePenColorIcon = menu.findItem(R.id.action_change_whiteboard_pen_color)
 778‚Üí        // White board button
 779‚Üí        if (prefWhiteboard) {
 780‚Üí            // Configure the whiteboard related items in the action bar
 781‚Üí            toggleWhiteboardIcon.setTitle(R.string.disable_whiteboard)
 782‚Üí            // Always allow "Disable Whiteboard", even if "Enable Whiteboard" is disabled
 783‚Üí            toggleWhiteboardIcon.isVisible = true
 784‚Üí            if (!mActionButtons.status.toggleStylusIsDisabled()) {
 785‚Üí                toggleStylusIcon.isVisible = true
 786‚Üí            }
 787‚Üí            if (!mActionButtons.status.hideWhiteboardIsDisabled()) {
 788‚Üí                hideWhiteboardIcon.isVisible = true
 789‚Üí            }
 790‚Üí            if (!mActionButtons.status.clearWhiteboardIsDisabled()) {
 791‚Üí                menu.findItem(R.id.action_clear_whiteboard).isVisible = true
 792‚Üí            }
 793‚Üí            if (!mActionButtons.status.saveWhiteboardIsDisabled()) {
 794‚Üí                menu.findItem(R.id.action_save_whiteboard).isVisible = true
 795‚Üí            }
 796‚Üí            if (!mActionButtons.status.whiteboardPenColorIsDisabled()) {
 797‚Üí                changePenColorIcon.isVisible = true
 798‚Üí            }

 921‚Üí            this.buttonCount

 939‚Üí                easeButton2!!.setup(background[2], textColor[2], R.string.ease_button_good)
 940‚Üí                easeButton2!!.requestFocus()

 942‚Üí            3 -> {
 943‚Üí                // Ease 2 is good
 944‚Üí                easeButton2!!.setup(background[2], textColor[2], R.string.ease_button_good)
 945‚Üí                // Ease 3 is easy
 946‚Üí                easeButton3!!.setup(background[3], textColor[3], R.string.ease_button_easy)

 948‚Üí            }
 949‚Üí            else -> {
 950‚Üí                // Ease 2 is "hard"
 951‚Üí                easeButton2!!.setup(background[1], textColor[1], R.string.ease_button_hard)
 952‚Üí                easeButton2!!.requestFocus()
 953‚Üí                // Ease 3 is good

 956‚Üí                easeButton3!!.requestFocus()

 960‚Üí        // Show next review time

1021‚Üí    private fun updateScreenCounts() {
1022‚Üí        if (currentCard == null) return
1023‚Üí        super.updateActionBar()
1024‚Üí        val actionBar = supportActionBar
1025‚Üí        val counts = sched!!.counts(currentCard!!)
1026‚Üí        if (actionBar != null) {
1027‚Üí            if (mPrefShowETA) {
1028‚Üí                mEta = sched!!.eta(counts, false)
1029‚Üí                actionBar.subtitle = Utils.remainingTime(this, (mEta * 60).toLong())
1030‚Üí            }
1031‚Üí        }
1032‚Üí        mNewCount = SpannableString(counts.new.toString())
1033‚Üí        mLrnCount = SpannableString(counts.lrn.toString())
1034‚Üí        mRevCount = SpannableString(counts.rev.toString())
1035‚Üí        if (mPrefHideDueCount) {
1036‚Üí            mRevCount = SpannableString("???")
1037‚Üí        }
1038‚Üí        // if this code is run as a card is being answered, currentCard may be non-null but
1039‚Üí        // the queues may be empty - we can't call countIdx() in such a case
1040‚Üí        if (counts.count() != 0) {
1041‚Üí            when (sched!!.countIdx(currentCard!!)) {
1042‚Üí                Counts.Queue.NEW -> mNewCount!!.setSpan(UnderlineSpan(), 0, mNewCount!!.length, 0)
1043‚Üí                Counts.Queue.LRN -> mLrnCount!!.setSpan(UnderlineSpan(), 0, mLrnCount!!.length, 0)
1044‚Üí                Counts.Queue.REV -> mRevCount!!.setSpan(UnderlineSpan(), 0, mRevCount!!.length, 0)
1045‚Üí            }
1046‚Üí        }
1047‚Üí        mTextBarNew.text = mNewCount
1048‚Üí        mTextBarLearn.text = mLrnCount
1049‚Üí        mTextBarReview.text = mRevCount
1050‚Üí    }

1122‚Üí    override fun executeCommand(which: ViewerCommand, fromGesture: Gesture?): Boolean {
1123‚Üí        if (isControlBlocked && which !== ViewerCommand.EXIT) {
1124‚Üí            return false
1125‚Üí        }
1126‚Üí        when (which) {
1127‚Üí            ViewerCommand.TOGGLE_FLAG_RED -> {
1128‚Üí                toggleFlag(CardMarker.FLAG_RED)
1129‚Üí                return true
1130‚Üí            }
1131‚Üí            ViewerCommand.TOGGLE_FLAG_ORANGE -> {
1132‚Üí                toggleFlag(CardMarker.FLAG_ORANGE)
1133‚Üí                return true
1134‚Üí            }
1135‚Üí            ViewerCommand.TOGGLE_FLAG_GREEN -> {
1136‚Üí                toggleFlag(CardMarker.FLAG_GREEN)
1137‚Üí                return true
1138‚Üí            }
1139‚Üí            ViewerCommand.TOGGLE_FLAG_BLUE -> {
1140‚Üí                toggleFlag(CardMarker.FLAG_BLUE)
1141‚Üí                return true
1142‚Üí            }
1143‚Üí            ViewerCommand.TOGGLE_FLAG_PINK -> {
1144‚Üí                toggleFlag(CardMarker.FLAG_PINK)
1145‚Üí                return true
1146‚Üí            }
1147‚Üí            ViewerCommand.TOGGLE_FLAG_TURQUOISE -> {
1148‚Üí                toggleFlag(CardMarker.FLAG_TURQUOISE)
1149‚Üí                return true
1150‚Üí            }
1151‚Üí            ViewerCommand.TOGGLE_FLAG_PURPLE -> {
1152‚Üí                toggleFlag(CardMarker.FLAG_PURPLE)
1153‚Üí                return true
1154‚Üí            }
1155‚Üí            ViewerCommand.UNSET_FLAG -> {
1156‚Üí                onFlag(currentCard, CardMarker.FLAG_NONE)
1157‚Üí                return true
1158‚Üí            }
1159‚Üí            ViewerCommand.MARK -> {
1160‚Üí                onMark(currentCard)
1161‚Üí                return true
1162‚Üí            }
1163‚Üí            ViewerCommand.ADD_NOTE -> {

1166‚Üí            }
1167‚Üí            ViewerCommand.CARD_INFO -> {

1170‚Üí            }
1171‚Üí            else -> return super.executeCommand(which, fromGesture)

1232‚Üí        prefWhiteboard = state
1233‚Üí        MetaDB.storeWhiteboardState(this, parentDid, state)
1234‚Üí        if (state && whiteboard == null) {
1235‚Üí            createWhiteboard()
1236‚Üí        }
1237‚Üí    }
1238‚Üí
1239‚Üí    @Suppress("deprecation") // #9332: UI Visibility -> Insets
1240‚Üí    private fun setFullScreen(a: AbstractFlashcardViewer) {
1241‚Üí        // Set appropriate flags to enable Sticky Immersive mode.
1242‚Üí        a.window.decorView.systemUiVisibility = (
1243‚Üí            View.SYSTEM_UI_FLAG_LAYOUT_STABLE // | View.SYSTEM_UI_FLAG_LAYOUT_HIDE_NAVIGATION // temporarily disabled due to #5245
1244‚Üí                or View.SYSTEM_UI_FLAG_LAYOUT_FULLSCREEN
1245‚Üí                or View.SYSTEM_UI_FLAG_HIDE_NAVIGATION
1246‚Üí                or View.SYSTEM_UI_FLAG_FULLSCREEN
1247‚Üí                or View.SYSTEM_UI_FLAG_LOW_PROFILE
1248‚Üí                or View.SYSTEM_UI_FLAG_IMMERSIVE
1249‚Üí            )
1250‚Üí        // Show / hide the Action bar together with the status bar
1251‚Üí        val prefs = a.sharedPrefs()
1252‚Üí        val fullscreenMode = fromPreference(prefs)
1253‚Üí        a.window.statusBarColor = getColorFromAttr(a, android.R.attr.colorPrimary)
1254‚Üí        val decorView = a.window.decorView
1255‚Üí        decorView.setOnSystemUiVisibilityChangeListener { flags: Int ->
1256‚Üí            val toolbar = a.findViewById<View>(R.id.toolbar)
1257‚Üí            val answerButtons = a.findViewById<View>(R.id.answer_options_layout)
1258‚Üí            val topbar = a.findViewById<View>(R.id.top_bar)
1259‚Üí            if (toolbar == null || topbar == null || answerButtons == null) {
1260‚Üí                return@setOnSystemUiVisibilityChangeListener
1261‚Üí            }
1262‚Üí            // Note that system bars will only be "visible" if none of the
1263‚Üí            // LOW_PROFILE, HIDE_NAVIGATION, or FULLSCREEN flags are set.
1264‚Üí            val visible = flags and View.SYSTEM_UI_FLAG_HIDE_NAVIGATION == 0
1265‚Üí            Timber.d("System UI visibility change. Visible: %b", visible)
1266‚Üí            if (visible) {
1267‚Üí                showViewWithAnimation(toolbar)
1268‚Üí                if (fullscreenMode == FullScreenMode.FULLSCREEN_ALL_GONE) {
1269‚Üí                    showViewWithAnimation(topbar)
1270‚Üí                    showViewWithAnimation(answerButtons)
1271‚Üí                }
1272‚Üí            } else {
1273‚Üí                hideViewWithAnimation(toolbar)
1274‚Üí                if (fullscreenMode == FullScreenMode.FULLSCREEN_ALL_GONE) {
1275‚Üí                    hideViewWithAnimation(topbar)
1276‚Üí                    hideViewWithAnimation(answerButtons)
1277‚Üí                }
1278‚Üí            }
1279‚Üí        }
1280‚Üí    }
1281‚Üí
1282‚Üí    private fun showViewWithAnimation(view: View) {
1283‚Üí        view.alpha = 0.0f
1284‚Üí        view.visibility = View.VISIBLE
1285‚Üí        view.animate().alpha(TRANSPARENCY).setDuration(ANIMATION_DURATION.toLong()).setListener(null)
1286‚Üí    }
1287‚Üí
1288‚Üí    private fun hideViewWithAnimation(view: View) {
1289‚Üí        view.animate()
1290‚Üí            .alpha(0f)
1291‚Üí            .setDuration(ANIMATION_DURATION.toLong())
1292‚Üí            .setListener(object : AnimatorListenerAdapter() {
1293‚Üí                override fun onAnimationEnd(animation: Animator) {
1294‚Üí                    view.visibility = View.GONE
1295‚Üí                }
1296‚Üí            })
1297‚Üí    }
1298‚Üí
1299‚Üí    @Suppress("deprecation") // #9332: UI Visibility -> Insets
1300‚Üí    private fun isImmersiveSystemUiVisible(activity: AnkiActivity): Boolean {
1301‚Üí        return activity.window.decorView.systemUiVisibility and View.SYSTEM_UI_FLAG_HIDE_NAVIGATION == 0
1302‚Üí    }
1303‚Üí
1304‚Üí    private fun createWhiteboard() {
1305‚Üí        whiteboard = createInstance(this, true, this)
1306‚Üí
1307‚Üí        // We use the pen color of the selected deck at the time the whiteboard is enabled.
1308‚Üí        // This is how all other whiteboard settings are
1309‚Üí        val whiteboardPenColor = MetaDB.getWhiteboardPenColor(this, parentDid).fromPreferences()
1310‚Üí        if (whiteboardPenColor != null) {
1311‚Üí            whiteboard!!.penColor = whiteboardPenColor
1312‚Üí        }
1313‚Üí        whiteboard!!.setOnPaintColorChangeListener(object : OnPaintColorChangeListener {
1314‚Üí            override fun onPaintColorChange(color: Int?) {
1315‚Üí                MetaDB.storeWhiteboardPenColor(this@Reviewer, parentDid, !currentTheme.isNightMode, color)
1316‚Üí            }
1317‚Üí        })
1318‚Üí        whiteboard!!.setOnTouchListener { v: View, event: MotionEvent? ->
1319‚Üí            if (event == null) return@setOnTouchListener false
1320‚Üí            // If the whiteboard is currently drawing, and triggers the system UI to show, we want to continue drawing.
1321‚Üí            if (!whiteboard!!.isCurrentlyDrawing && (
1322‚Üí                !mShowWhiteboard || (
1323‚Üí                    mPrefFullscreenReview &&
1324‚Üí                        isImmersiveSystemUiVisible(this@Reviewer)
1325‚Üí                    )
1326‚Üí                )
1327‚Üí            ) {
1328‚Üí                // Bypass whiteboard listener when it's hidden or fullscreen immersive mode is temporarily suspended
1329‚Üí                v.performClick()
1330‚Üí                return@setOnTouchListener gestureDetector!!.onTouchEvent(event)
1331‚Üí            }
1332‚Üí            whiteboard!!.handleTouchEvent(event)
1333‚Üí        }
1334‚Üí    }
1335‚Üí
1336‚Üí    // Show or hide the whiteboard
1337‚Üí    private fun setWhiteboardVisibility(state: Boolean) {
1338‚Üí        mShowWhiteboard = state
1339‚Üí        MetaDB.storeWhiteboardVisibility(this, parentDid, state)
1340‚Üí        if (state) {
1341‚Üí            whiteboard!!.visibility = View.VISIBLE
1342‚Üí            disableDrawerSwipe()
1343‚Üí        } else {
1344‚Üí            whiteboard!!.visibility = View.GONE
1345‚Üí            if (!mHasDrawerSwipeConflicts) {
1346‚Üí                enableDrawerSwipe()
1347‚Üí            }
1348‚Üí        }
1349‚Üí    }
1350‚Üí
1351‚Üí    private fun disableDrawerSwipeOnConflicts() {
1352‚Üí        if (mGestureProcessor.isBound(Gesture.SWIPE_UP, Gesture.SWIPE_DOWN, Gesture.SWIPE_RIGHT)) {
1353‚Üí            mHasDrawerSwipeConflicts = true
1354‚Üí            super.disableDrawerSwipe()
1355‚Üí        }
1356‚Üí    }

1371‚Üí    /**
1372‚Üí     * Whether or not dismiss note is available for current card and specified DismissType
1373‚Üí     * @return true if there is another card of same note that could be dismissed
1374‚Üí     */
1375‚Üí    @KotlinCleanup("mCurrentCard handling")
1376‚Üí    private fun suspendNoteAvailable(): Boolean {
1377‚Üí        return if (currentCard == null || isControlBlocked) {
1378‚Üí            false
1379‚Üí        } else {
1380‚Üí            col.db.queryScalar(
1381‚Üí                "select 1 from cards where nid = ? and id != ? and queue != " + Consts.QUEUE_TYPE_SUSPENDED + " limit 1",
1382‚Üí                currentCard!!.nid,
1383‚Üí                currentCard!!.id
1384‚Üí            ) == 1
1385‚Üí        }
1386‚Üí        // whether there exists a sibling not buried.
1387‚Üí    }
1388‚Üí
1389‚Üí    @KotlinCleanup("mCurrentCard handling")
1390‚Üí    private fun buryNoteAvailable(): Boolean {
1391‚Üí        return if (currentCard == null || isControlBlocked) {
1392‚Üí            false
1393‚Üí        } else {
1394‚Üí            col.db.queryScalar(
1395‚Üí                "select 1 from cards where nid = ? and id != ? and queue >=  " + Consts.QUEUE_TYPE_NEW + " limit 1",
1396‚Üí                currentCard!!.nid,
1397‚Üí                currentCard!!.id
1398‚Üí            ) == 1
1399‚Üí        }
1400‚Üí        // Whether there exists a sibling which is neither suspended nor buried
1401‚Üí    }

1483‚Üí        context: Context,
1484‚Üí        menuItem: MenuItem,
1485‚Üí        @MenuRes subMenuRes: Int,
1486‚Üí        onMenuItemSelection: (MenuItem) -> Boolean,
1487‚Üí        showsSubMenu: () -> Boolean
1488‚Üí    ): View = ImageButton(context, null, android.R.attr.actionButtonStyle).apply {

1493‚Üí        setOnClickListener {

1495‚Üí                return@setOnClickListener
1496‚Üí            }
1497‚Üí            if (showsSubMenu()) {

1499‚Üí                    inflate(subMenuRes)
1500‚Üí                    setOnMenuItemClickListener(onMenuItemSelection)
1501‚Üí                    show()

1503‚Üí            } else {

1624‚Üí            return true
1625‚Üí        }
1626‚Üí    }

 40‚Üí@KotlinCleanup("see if we can make variables lazy, or properties without the `s` prefix")
 41‚Üíobject UsageAnalytics {
 42‚Üí    const val ANALYTICS_OPTIN_KEY = "analyticsOptIn"
 43‚Üí
 44‚Üí    @KotlinCleanup("lateinit")
 45‚Üí    private var sAnalytics: GoogleAnalytics? = null
 46‚Üí    private var sOriginalUncaughtExceptionHandler: Thread.UncaughtExceptionHandler? = null
 47‚Üí    private var sOptIn = false

 50‚Üí
 51‚Üí    /**
 52‚Üí     * Initialize the analytics provider - must be called prior to sending anything.
 53‚Üí     * Usage after that is static
 54‚Üí     * Note: may need to implement sampling strategy internally to limit hits, or not track Reviewer...
 55‚Üí     *
 56‚Üí     * @param context required to look up the analytics codes for the app
 57‚Üí     */
 58‚Üí    @Synchronized
 59‚Üí    fun initialize(context: Context): GoogleAnalytics? {
 60‚Üí        Timber.i("initialize()")
 61‚Üí        if (sAnalytics == null) {
 62‚Üí            Timber.d("App tracking id 'tid' = %s", getAnalyticsTag(context))
 63‚Üí            val gaConfig = GoogleAnalyticsConfig()
 64‚Üí                .setBatchingEnabled(true)
 65‚Üí                .setSamplePercentage(getAnalyticsSamplePercentage(context))
 66‚Üí                .setBatchSize(1) // until this handles application termination we will lose hits if batch>1
 67‚Üí            sAnalytics = GoogleAnalytics.builder()
 68‚Üí                .withTrackingId(getAnalyticsTag(context))
 69‚Üí                .withConfig(gaConfig)
 70‚Üí                .withDefaultRequest(
 71‚Üí                    AndroidDefaultRequest()
 72‚Üí                        .setAndroidRequestParameters(context)
 73‚Üí                        .applicationName(context.getString(R.string.app_name))
 74‚Üí                        .applicationVersion(Integer.toString(BuildConfig.VERSION_CODE))
 75‚Üí                        .applicationId(BuildConfig.APPLICATION_ID)
 76‚Üí                        .trackingId(getAnalyticsTag(context))
 77‚Üí                        .clientId(Installation.id(context))
 78‚Üí                        .anonymizeIp(context.resources.getBoolean(R.bool.ga_anonymizeIp))
 79‚Üí                )
 80‚Üí                .withHttpClient(OkHttpClientImpl(gaConfig))
 81‚Üí                .build()
 82‚Üí        }
 83‚Üí        installDefaultExceptionHandler()
 84‚Üí        val userPrefs = context.sharedPrefs()
 85‚Üí        optIn = userPrefs.getBoolean(ANALYTICS_OPTIN_KEY, false)
 86‚Üí        userPrefs.registerOnSharedPreferenceChangeListener { sharedPreferences: SharedPreferences, key: String? ->
 87‚Üí            if (key == ANALYTICS_OPTIN_KEY) {
 88‚Üí                val newValue = sharedPreferences.getBoolean(key, false)
 89‚Üí                Timber.i("Setting analytics opt-in to: %b", newValue)
 90‚Üí                optIn = newValue
 91‚Üí            }
 92‚Üí        }
 93‚Üí        return sAnalytics
 94‚Üí    }
 95‚Üí
 96‚Üí    private fun getAnalyticsTag(context: Context): String? {
 97‚Üí        if (sAnalyticsTrackingId == null) {
 98‚Üí            sAnalyticsTrackingId = context.getString(R.string.ga_trackingId)
 99‚Üí        }
100‚Üí        return sAnalyticsTrackingId
101‚Üí    }

103‚Üí    private fun getAnalyticsSamplePercentage(context: Context): Int {
104‚Üí        if (sAnalyticsSamplePercentage == -1) {
105‚Üí            sAnalyticsSamplePercentage = context.resources.getInteger(R.integer.ga_sampleFrequency)
106‚Üí        }
107‚Üí        return sAnalyticsSamplePercentage
108‚Üí    }

117‚Üí    /**
118‚Üí     * We want to send an analytics hit on any exception, then chain to other handlers (e.g., ACRA)
119‚Üí     */
120‚Üí    @Synchronized
121‚Üí    private fun installDefaultExceptionHandler() {
122‚Üí        sOriginalUncaughtExceptionHandler = Thread.getDefaultUncaughtExceptionHandler()
123‚Üí        Thread.setDefaultUncaughtExceptionHandler { thread: Thread?, throwable: Throwable ->
124‚Üí            sendAnalyticsException(throwable, true)
125‚Üí            if (thread == null) {
126‚Üí                Timber.w("unexpected: thread was null")
127‚Üí                return@setDefaultUncaughtExceptionHandler
128‚Üí            }
129‚Üí            sOriginalUncaughtExceptionHandler!!.uncaughtException(thread, throwable)
130‚Üí        }
131‚Üí    }
132‚Üí
133‚Üí    /**
134‚Üí     * Reset the default exception handler
135‚Üí     */
136‚Üí    @Synchronized
137‚Üí    private fun unInstallDefaultExceptionHandler() {
138‚Üí        Thread.setDefaultUncaughtExceptionHandler(sOriginalUncaughtExceptionHandler)
139‚Üí        sOriginalUncaughtExceptionHandler = null
140‚Üí    }
141‚Üí
142‚Üí    /**
143‚Üí     * Allow users to enable or disable analytics
144‚Üí     */
145‚Üí    @set:Synchronized
146‚Üí    private var optIn: Boolean
147‚Üí        get() {
148‚Üí            Timber.d("getOptIn() status: %s", sOptIn)
149‚Üí            return sOptIn
150‚Üí        }
151‚Üí        private set(optIn) {
152‚Üí            Timber.i("setOptIn(): from %s to %s", sOptIn, optIn)
153‚Üí            sOptIn = optIn
154‚Üí            sAnalytics!!.flush()
155‚Üí            sAnalytics!!.config.isEnabled = optIn
156‚Üí            sAnalytics!!.performSamplingElection()
157‚Üí            Timber.d("setOptIn() optIn / sAnalytics.config().enabled(): %s/%s", sOptIn, sAnalytics!!.config.isEnabled)
158‚Üí        }

170‚Üí    /**
171‚Üí     * Re-Initialize the analytics provider
172‚Üí     */
173‚Üí    @Synchronized
174‚Üí    fun reInitialize() {
175‚Üí        // send any pending async hits, re-chain default exception handlers and re-init
176‚Üí        Timber.i("reInitialize()")
177‚Üí        sAnalytics!!.flush()
178‚Üí        sAnalytics = null
179‚Üí        unInstallDefaultExceptionHandler()
180‚Üí        initialize(AnkiDroidApp.instance.applicationContext)
181‚Üí    }

183‚Üí    /**
184‚Üí     * Submit a screen for aggregation / analysis.
185‚Üí     * Intended for use to determine if / how features are being used
186‚Üí     *
187‚Üí     * @param object the result of Object.getClass().getSimpleName() will be used as the screen tag
188‚Üí     */
189‚Üí    @KotlinCleanup("rename object")
190‚Üí    fun sendAnalyticsScreenView(`object`: Any) {
191‚Üí        sendAnalyticsScreenView(`object`.javaClass.simpleName)
192‚Üí    }

194‚Üí    /**
195‚Üí     * Submit a screen display with a synthetic name for aggregation / analysis
196‚Üí     * Intended for use if your class handles multiple screens you want to track separately
197‚Üí     *
198‚Üí     * @param screenName screenName the name to show in analysis reports
199‚Üí     */
200‚Üí    fun sendAnalyticsScreenView(screenName: String) {
201‚Üí        Timber.d("sendAnalyticsScreenView(): %s", screenName)
202‚Üí        if (!optIn) {
203‚Üí            return
204‚Üí        }
205‚Üí        sAnalytics!!.screenView().screenName(screenName).sendAsync()
206‚Üí    }
207‚Üí
208‚Üí    /**
209‚Üí     * Send a detailed arbitrary analytics event, with noun/verb pairs and extra data if needed
210‚Üí     *
211‚Üí     * @param category the category of event, make your own but use a constant so reporting is good
212‚Üí     * @param action   the action the user performed
213‚Üí     * @param value    A value for the event, Integer.MIN_VALUE signifies caller shouldn't send the value
214‚Üí     * @param label    A label for the event, may be null
215‚Üí     */
216‚Üí    fun sendAnalyticsEvent(category: String, action: String, value: Int? = null, label: String? = null) {
217‚Üí        Timber.d("sendAnalyticsEvent() category/action/value/label: %s/%s/%s/%s", category, action, value, label)
218‚Üí        if (!optIn) {
219‚Üí            return
220‚Üí        }
221‚Üí        val event = sAnalytics!!.event().eventCategory(category).eventAction(action)
222‚Üí        if (label != null) {
223‚Üí            event.eventLabel(label)
224‚Üí        }
225‚Üí        if (value != null) {
226‚Üí            event.eventValue(value)
227‚Üí        }
228‚Üí        event.sendAsync()
229‚Üí    }
230‚Üí
231‚Üí    /**
232‚Üí     * Send an exception event out for aggregation/analysis, parsed from the exception information
233‚Üí     *
234‚Üí     * @param t     Throwable to send for analysis
235‚Üí     * @param fatal whether it was fatal or not
236‚Üí     */
237‚Üí    fun sendAnalyticsException(t: Throwable, fatal: Boolean) {
238‚Üí        sendAnalyticsException(getCause(t).toString(), fatal)
239‚Üí    }
240‚Üí
241‚Üí    @KotlinCleanup("convert to sequence")
242‚Üí    fun getCause(t: Throwable): Throwable {
243‚Üí        var cause: Throwable?
244‚Üí        var result = t
245‚Üí        while (null != result.cause.also { cause = it } && result != cause) {
246‚Üí            result = cause!!
247‚Üí        }
248‚Üí        return result
249‚Üí    }
250‚Üí
251‚Üí    /**
252‚Üí     * Send an exception event out for aggregation/analysis
253‚Üí     *
254‚Üí     * @param description API limited to 100 characters, truncated here to 100 if needed
255‚Üí     * @param fatal       whether it was fatal or not
256‚Üí     */
257‚Üí    fun sendAnalyticsException(description: String, fatal: Boolean) {
258‚Üí        Timber.d("sendAnalyticsException() description/fatal: %s/%s", description, fatal)
259‚Üí        if (!sOptIn) {
260‚Üí            return
261‚Üí        }
262‚Üí        sAnalytics!!.exception().exceptionDescription(description).exceptionFatal(fatal).sendAsync()
263‚Üí    }

265‚Üí    internal fun canGetDefaultUserAgent(): Boolean {
266‚Üí        // #5502 - getDefaultUserAgent starts a WebView. We can't have two WebViews with the same data directory.
267‚Üí        // But ACRA starts an :acra process which does not terminate when AnkiDroid is restarted. https://crbug.com/558377
268‚Üí
269‚Üí        // if we're not under the ACRA process then we're fine to initialize a WebView
270‚Üí        return if (!ACRA.isACRASenderServiceProcess()) {
271‚Üí            true
272‚Üí        } else {
273‚Üí            hasSetDataDirectory()
274‚Üí        }
275‚Üí
276‚Üí        // If we have a custom data directory, then the crash will not occur.
277‚Üí    }

279‚Üí    // A listener on this preference handles the rest
280‚Üí    var isEnabled: Boolean
281‚Üí        get() {
282‚Üí            val userPrefs = AnkiDroidApp.instance.sharedPrefs()
283‚Üí            return userPrefs.getBoolean(ANALYTICS_OPTIN_KEY, false)
284‚Üí        }
285‚Üí        set(value) {
286‚Üí            // A listener on this preference handles the rest
287‚Üí            AnkiDroidApp.instance.sharedPrefs().edit {
288‚Üí                putBoolean(ANALYTICS_OPTIN_KEY, value)
289‚Üí            }
290‚Üí        }

297‚Üí    /**
298‚Üí     * An Android-specific device config generator. Without this it's "Desktop" and unknown for all hardware.
299‚Üí     * It is interesting to us what devices people use though (for instance: is Amazon Kindle support worth it?
300‚Üí     * Is anyone still using e-ink devices? How many people are on tablets? ChromeOS?)
301‚Üí     */
302‚Üí    private class AndroidDefaultRequest : DefaultRequest() {
303‚Üí        fun setAndroidRequestParameters(context: Context): DefaultRequest {
304‚Üí            // Are we running on really large screens or small screens? Send raw screen size
305‚Üí            try {
306‚Üí                val size = DisplayUtils.getDisplayDimensions(context)
307‚Üí                this.screenResolution(size.x.toString() + "x" + size.y)
308‚Üí            } catch (e: RuntimeException) {
309‚Üí                Timber.w(e)
310‚Üí                // nothing much to do here, it means we couldn't get WindowManager
311‚Üí            }
312‚Üí
313‚Üí            // We can have up to 20 of these - there might be other things we want to know
314‚Üí            // but simply seeing what hardware we are running on should be useful
315‚Üí            this.customDimension(1, Build.VERSION.RELEASE) // systemVersion, e.g. "7.1.1"  for Android 7.1.1
316‚Üí            this.customDimension(2, Build.BRAND) // brand e.g. "OnePlus"
317‚Üí            this.customDimension(3, Build.MODEL) // model e.g. "ONEPLUS A6013" for the 6T
318‚Üí            this.customDimension(4, Build.BOARD) // deviceId e.g. "sdm845" for the 6T
319‚Üí
320‚Üí            // This is important for google to auto-fingerprint us for default reporting
321‚Üí            // It is not possible to set operating system explicitly, there is no API or analytics parameter for it
322‚Üí            // Instead they respond that they auto-parse User-Agent strings for analytics attribution
323‚Üí            // For maximum analytics built-in report compatibility we will send the official WebView User-Agent string
324‚Üí            try {
325‚Üí                if (canGetDefaultUserAgent()) {
326‚Üí                    this.userAgent(WebSettings.getDefaultUserAgent(context))
327‚Üí                } else {
328‚Üí                    this.userAgent(System.getProperty("http.agent"))
329‚Üí                }
330‚Üí            } catch (e: RuntimeException) {
331‚Üí                Timber.w(e)
332‚Üí                // Catch RuntimeException as WebView initialization blows up in unpredictable ways
333‚Üí                // but analytics should never be a show-stopper
334‚Üí                this.userAgent(System.getProperty("http.agent"))
335‚Üí            }
336‚Üí            return this
337‚Üí        }
338‚Üí    }

 10‚Üí WARRANTY; without even the implied warranty of MERCHANTABILITY or FITNESS FOR A
 11‚Üí PARTICULAR PURPOSE. See the GNU General Public License for more details.

 14‚Üí this program.  If not, see <http://www.gnu.org/licenses/>.
 15‚Üí */
 16‚Üípackage com.ichi2.anki.cardviewer
 17‚Üí
 18‚Üíimport android.content.SharedPreferences
 19‚Üíimport android.view.KeyEvent
 20‚Üíimport androidx.core.content.edit
 21‚Üíimport com.ichi2.anki.R
 22‚Üíimport com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.Binding.Companion.keyCode
 23‚Üíimport com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.Binding.Companion.unicode
 24‚Üíimport com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.Binding.ModifierKeys
 25‚Üíimport com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.Binding.ModifierKeys.Companion.ctrl
 26‚Üíimport com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.Binding.ModifierKeys.Companion.shift
 27‚Üíimport com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.CardSide
 28‚Üíimport com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.MappableBinding
 29‚Üíimport com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.MappableBinding.Companion.fromPreference
 30‚Üíimport com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.MappableBinding.Companion.toPreferenceString
 31‚Üíimport java.util.*
 32‚Üíimport java.util.function.BiFunction
 33‚Üíimport java.util.stream.Collectors
 34‚Üí
 35‚Üí/** Abstraction: Discuss moving many of these to 'Reviewer'  */
 36‚Üíenum class ViewerCommand(val resourceId: Int) {
 37‚Üí    SHOW_ANSWER(R.string.show_answer),
 38‚Üí    FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE1(R.string.gesture_answer_1),
 39‚Üí    FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE2(R.string.gesture_answer_2),
 40‚Üí    FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE3(R.string.gesture_answer_3),
 41‚Üí    FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE4(R.string.gesture_answer_4),
 42‚Üí    FLIP_OR_ANSWER_RECOMMENDED(R.string.gesture_answer_green),
 43‚Üí    FLIP_OR_ANSWER_BETTER_THAN_RECOMMENDED(R.string.gesture_answer_better_recommended),
 44‚Üí    UNDO(R.string.undo),
 45‚Üí    EDIT(R.string.cardeditor_title_edit_card),
 46‚Üí    MARK(R.string.menu_mark_note),
 47‚Üí    BURY_CARD(R.string.menu_bury_card),
 48‚Üí    SUSPEND_CARD(R.string.menu_suspend_card),
 49‚Üí    DELETE(R.string.menu_delete_note),
 50‚Üí    PLAY_MEDIA(R.string.gesture_play),
 51‚Üí    EXIT(R.string.gesture_abort_learning),
 52‚Üí    BURY_NOTE(R.string.menu_bury_note),
 53‚Üí    SUSPEND_NOTE(R.string.menu_suspend_note),
 54‚Üí    TOGGLE_FLAG_RED(R.string.gesture_flag_red),
 55‚Üí    TOGGLE_FLAG_ORANGE(R.string.gesture_flag_orange),
 56‚Üí    TOGGLE_FLAG_GREEN(R.string.gesture_flag_green),
 57‚Üí    TOGGLE_FLAG_BLUE(R.string.gesture_flag_blue),
 58‚Üí    TOGGLE_FLAG_PINK(R.string.gesture_flag_pink),
 59‚Üí    TOGGLE_FLAG_TURQUOISE(R.string.gesture_flag_turquoise),
 60‚Üí    TOGGLE_FLAG_PURPLE(R.string.gesture_flag_purple),
 61‚Üí    UNSET_FLAG(R.string.gesture_flag_remove),
 62‚Üí    PAGE_UP(R.string.gesture_page_up),
 63‚Üí    PAGE_DOWN(R.string.gesture_page_down),
 64‚Üí    TAG(R.string.add_tag),
 65‚Üí    CARD_INFO(R.string.card_info_title),
 66‚Üí    ABORT_AND_SYNC(R.string.gesture_abort_sync),
 67‚Üí    RECORD_VOICE(R.string.record_voice),
 68‚Üí    REPLAY_VOICE(R.string.replay_voice),
 69‚Üí    TOGGLE_WHITEBOARD(R.string.gesture_toggle_whiteboard),
 70‚Üí    CLEAR_WHITEBOARD(R.string.clear_whiteboard),
 71‚Üí    CHANGE_WHITEBOARD_PEN_COLOR(R.string.title_whiteboard_editor),
 72‚Üí    SHOW_HINT(R.string.gesture_show_hint),
 73‚Üí    SHOW_ALL_HINTS(R.string.gesture_show_all_hints),
 74‚Üí    ADD_NOTE(R.string.menu_add_note);
 75‚Üí
 76‚Üí    companion object {
 77‚Üí        val allDefaultBindings: List<MappableBinding>
 78‚Üí            get() = Arrays.stream(values())
 79‚Üí                .flatMap { x: ViewerCommand -> x.defaultValue.stream() }
 80‚Üí                .collect(Collectors.toList())
 81‚Üí    }
 82‚Üí
 83‚Üí    val preferenceKey: String
 84‚Üí        get() = "binding_$name"
 85‚Üí
 86‚Üí    fun addBinding(preferences: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding) {
 87‚Üí        val addAtStart = BiFunction { collection: MutableList<MappableBinding>, element: MappableBinding ->
 88‚Üí            // reorder the elements, moving the added binding to the first position
 89‚Üí            collection.remove(element)
 90‚Üí            collection.add(0, element)
 91‚Üí            true
 92‚Üí        }
 93‚Üí        addBindingInternal(preferences, binding, addAtStart)
 94‚Üí    }
 95‚Üí
 96‚Üí    fun addBindingAtEnd(preferences: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding) {
 97‚Üí        val addAtEnd = BiFunction { collection: MutableList<MappableBinding>, element: MappableBinding ->
 98‚Üí            // do not reorder the elements
 99‚Üí            if (collection.contains(element)) {
100‚Üí                return@BiFunction false
101‚Üí            }
102‚Üí            collection.add(element)
103‚Üí            return@BiFunction true
104‚Üí        }
105‚Üí        addBindingInternal(preferences, binding, addAtEnd)
106‚Üí    }
107‚Üí
108‚Üí    private fun addBindingInternal(preferences: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding, performAdd: BiFunction<MutableList<MappableBinding>, MappableBinding, Boolean>) {
109‚Üí        val bindings: MutableList<MappableBinding> = fromPreference(preferences, this)
110‚Üí        performAdd.apply(bindings, binding)
111‚Üí        val newValue: String = bindings.toPreferenceString()
112‚Üí        preferences.edit { putString(preferenceKey, newValue) }
113‚Üí    }
114‚Üí
115‚Üí    fun removeBinding(prefs: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding) {
116‚Üí        val bindings: MutableList<MappableBinding> = MappableBinding.fromPreferenceString(preferenceKey)
117‚Üí        bindings.remove(binding)
118‚Üí        prefs.edit {
119‚Üí            putString(preferenceKey, bindings.toPreferenceString())
120‚Üí        }
121‚Üí    }
122‚Üí
123‚Üí    // If we use the serialised format, then this adds additional coupling to the properties.
124‚Üí    val defaultValue: List<MappableBinding>
125‚Üí        get() = // If we use the serialised format, then this adds additional coupling to the properties.
126‚Üí            when (this) {
127‚Üí                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE1 -> from(
128‚Üí                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_Y, CardSide.BOTH),
129‚Üí                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_1, CardSide.ANSWER),
130‚Üí                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_1, CardSide.ANSWER)
131‚Üí                )
132‚Üí                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE2 -> from(
133‚Üí                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_X, CardSide.BOTH),
134‚Üí                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_2, CardSide.ANSWER),
135‚Üí                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_2, CardSide.ANSWER)
136‚Üí                )
137‚Üí                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE3 -> from(
138‚Üí                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_B, CardSide.BOTH),
139‚Üí                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_3, CardSide.ANSWER),
140‚Üí                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_3, CardSide.ANSWER)
141‚Üí                )
142‚Üí                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE4 -> from(
143‚Üí                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_A, CardSide.BOTH),
144‚Üí                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_4, CardSide.ANSWER),
145‚Üí                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_4, CardSide.ANSWER)
146‚Üí                )
147‚Üí                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_RECOMMENDED -> from(
148‚Üí                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_DPAD_CENTER, CardSide.BOTH),
149‚Üí                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_SPACE, CardSide.ANSWER),
150‚Üí                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_ENTER, CardSide.ANSWER),
151‚Üí                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_ENTER, CardSide.ANSWER)
152‚Üí                )
153‚Üí                EDIT -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_E, CardSide.BOTH))
154‚Üí                MARK -> from(unicode('*', CardSide.BOTH))
155‚Üí                BURY_CARD -> from(unicode('-', CardSide.BOTH))
156‚Üí                BURY_NOTE -> from(unicode('=', CardSide.BOTH))
157‚Üí                SUSPEND_CARD -> from(unicode('@', CardSide.BOTH))
158‚Üí                SUSPEND_NOTE -> from(unicode('!', CardSide.BOTH))
159‚Üí                PLAY_MEDIA -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_R, CardSide.BOTH), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_F5, CardSide.BOTH))
160‚Üí                REPLAY_VOICE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_V, CardSide.BOTH))
161‚Üí                RECORD_VOICE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_V, CardSide.BOTH, shift()))
162‚Üí                UNDO -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_Z, CardSide.BOTH))
163‚Üí                TOGGLE_FLAG_RED -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_1, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_1, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
164‚Üí                TOGGLE_FLAG_ORANGE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_2, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_2, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
165‚Üí                TOGGLE_FLAG_GREEN -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_3, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_3, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
166‚Üí                TOGGLE_FLAG_BLUE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_4, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_4, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
167‚Üí                TOGGLE_FLAG_PINK -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_5, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_5, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
168‚Üí                TOGGLE_FLAG_TURQUOISE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_6, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_6, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
169‚Üí                TOGGLE_FLAG_PURPLE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_7, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_7, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
170‚Üí                SHOW_HINT -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_H, CardSide.BOTH))
171‚Üí                SHOW_ALL_HINTS -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_G, CardSide.BOTH))
172‚Üí                ADD_NOTE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_A, CardSide.BOTH))
173‚Üí                else -> ArrayList()
174‚Üí            }
175‚Üí
176‚Üí    private fun keyCode(keycode: Int, side: CardSide, keys: ModifierKeys): MappableBinding {
177‚Üí        return MappableBinding(keyCode(keys, keycode), MappableBinding.Screen.Reviewer(side))
178‚Üí    }
179‚Üí
180‚Üí    private fun unicode(c: Char, side: CardSide): MappableBinding {
181‚Üí        return MappableBinding(unicode(c), MappableBinding.Screen.Reviewer(side))
182‚Üí    }
183‚Üí
184‚Üí    private fun from(vararg bindings: MappableBinding): List<MappableBinding> {
185‚Üí        return ArrayList(listOf(*bindings))
186‚Üí    }
187‚Üí
188‚Üí    private fun keyCode(keyCode: Int, side: CardSide): MappableBinding {
189‚Üí        return MappableBinding(keyCode(keyCode), MappableBinding.Screen.Reviewer(side))
190‚Üí    }
191‚Üí
192‚Üí    fun interface CommandProcessor {
193‚Üí        /**
194‚Üí         *
195‚Üí         * example failure: answering an ease on the front of the card
196‚Üí         */
197‚Üí        fun executeCommand(which: ViewerCommand, fromGesture: Gesture?): Boolean
198‚Üí    }
199‚Üí}
200‚Üí

21‚Üíimport androidx.appcompat.view.menu.MenuItemImpl
22‚Üíimport com.ichi2.anki.R
23‚Üí
24‚Üíclass ActionButtons(private val reviewerUi: ReviewerUi) {
25‚Üí    // DEFECT: This should be private - it breaks the law of demeter, but it'll be a large refactoring to get
26‚Üí    // to this point
27‚Üí    val status: ActionButtonStatus = ActionButtonStatus(reviewerUi)
28‚Üí    private var mMenu: Menu? = null
29‚Üí    fun setup(preferences: SharedPreferences) {
30‚Üí        status.setup(preferences)
31‚Üí    }
32‚Üí
33‚Üí    /** Sets the order of the Action Buttons in the action bar  */
34‚Üí    fun setCustomButtonsStatus(menu: Menu) {
35‚Üí        status.setCustomButtons(menu)
36‚Üí        mMenu = menu
37‚Üí    }
38‚Üí
39‚Üí    fun findMenuItem(@IdRes resId: Int) = mMenu?.findItem(resId) as? MenuItemImpl
40‚Üí
41‚Üí    companion object {
42‚Üí        @IdRes
43‚Üí        val RES_FLAG = R.id.action_flag
44‚Üí
45‚Üí        @IdRes
46‚Üí        val RES_MARK = R.id.action_mark_card
47‚Üí    }
48‚Üí}

conversation_history.content:
1‚Üí/*
  2‚Üí *  Copyright (c) 2021 David Allison <davidallisongithub@gmail.com>
  3‚Üí *
  4‚Üí *  This program is free software; you can redistribute it and/or modify it under
  5‚Üí *  the terms of the GNU General Public License as published by the Free Software
  6‚Üí *  Foundation; either version 3 of the License, or (at your option) any later
  7‚Üí *  version.
  8‚Üí *
  9‚Üí *  This program is distributed in the hope that it will be useful, but WITHOUT ANY
 10‚Üí *  WARRANTY; without even the implied warranty of MERCHANTABILITY or FITNESS FOR A
 11‚Üí *  PARTICULAR PURPOSE. See the GNU General Public License for more details.
 12‚Üí *
 13‚Üí *  You should have received a copy of the GNU General Public License along with
 14‚Üí *  this program.  If not, see <http://www.gnu.org/licenses/>.
 15‚Üí */
 16‚Üípackage com.ichi2.anki.reviewer
 17‚Üí
 18‚Üíimport android.content.Context
 19‚Üíimport android.os.Build
 20‚Üíimport android.view.KeyEvent
 21‚Üíimport androidx.annotation.VisibleForTesting
 22‚Üíimport com.ichi2.anki.cardviewer.Gesture
 23‚Üíimport com.ichi2.compat.CompatHelper
 24‚Üíimport com.ichi2.utils.StringUtil
 25‚Üíimport timber.log.Timber
 26‚Üí
 27‚Üíclass Binding private constructor(val modifierKeys: ModifierKeys?, val keycode: Int?, val unicodeCharacter: Char?, val gesture: Gesture?) {
 28‚Üí    constructor(gesture: Gesture?) : this(null, null, null, gesture)
 29‚Üí
 30‚Üí    private fun getKeyCodePrefix(): String {
 31‚Üí        // KEY_PREFIX is not usable before API 23
 32‚Üí        val keyPrefix = if (CompatHelper.sdkVersion >= Build.VERSION_CODES.M) KEY_PREFIX.toString() else ""
 33‚Üí
 34‚Üí        if (keycode == null) {
 35‚Üí            return keyPrefix
 36‚Üí        }
 37‚Üí
 38‚Üí        if (KeyEvent.isGamepadButton(keycode)) {
 39‚Üí            return GAMEPAD_PREFIX
 40‚Üí        }
 41‚Üí
 42‚Üí        return keyPrefix
 43‚Üí    }
 44‚Üí    fun toDisplayString(context: Context?): String {
 45‚Üí        val string = StringBuilder()
 46‚Üí        when {
 47‚Üí            keycode != null -> {
 48‚Üí                string.append(getKeyCodePrefix())
 49‚Üí                string.append(' ')
 50‚Üí                string.append(modifierKeys!!.toString())
 51‚Üí                val keyCodeString = KeyEvent.keyCodeToString(keycode)
 52‚Üí                // replace "Button" as we use the gamepad icon
 53‚Üí                string.append(StringUtil.toTitleCase(keyCodeString.replace("KEYCODE_", "").replace("BUTTON_", "").replace('_', ' ')))
 54‚Üí            }
 55‚Üí            unicodeCharacter != null -> {
 56‚Üí                string.append(KEY_PREFIX)
 57‚Üí                string.append(' ')
 58‚Üí                string.append(modifierKeys!!.toString())
 59‚Üí                string.append(unicodeCharacter)
 60‚Üí            }
 61‚Üí            gesture != null -> {
 62‚Üí                string.append(gesture.toDisplayString(context!!))
 63‚Üí            }
 64‚Üí        }
 65‚Üí        return string.toString()
 66‚Üí    }
 67‚Üí
 68‚Üí    override fun toString(): String {
 69‚Üí        val string = StringBuilder()
 70‚Üí        when {
 71‚Üí            keycode != null -> {
 72‚Üí                string.append(KEY_PREFIX)
 73‚Üí                string.append(modifierKeys!!.toString())
 74‚Üí                string.append(keycode)
 75‚Üí            }
 76‚Üí            unicodeCharacter != null -> {
 77‚Üí                string.append(UNICODE_PREFIX)
 78‚Üí                string.append(modifierKeys!!.toString())
 79‚Üí                string.append(unicodeCharacter)
 80‚Üí            }
 81‚Üí            gesture != null -> {
 82‚Üí                string.append(GESTURE_PREFIX)
 83‚Üí                string.append(gesture)
 84‚Üí            }
 85‚Üí        }
 86‚Üí        return string.toString()
 87‚Üí    }
 88‚Üí
 89‚Üí    val isValid: Boolean get() = isKey || gesture != null
 90‚Üí    val isKeyCode: Boolean get() = keycode != null
 91‚Üí
 92‚Üí    val isKey: Boolean
 93‚Üí        get() = isKeyCode || unicodeCharacter != null
 94‚Üí
 95‚Üí    val isGesture: Boolean = gesture != null
 96‚Üí
 97‚Üí    fun matchesModifier(event: KeyEvent): Boolean {
 98‚Üí        return modifierKeys == null || modifierKeys.matches(event)
 99‚Üí    }
100‚Üí
101‚Üí    open class ModifierKeys internal constructor(private val shift: Boolean, private val ctrl: Boolean, private val alt: Boolean) {
102‚Üí        fun matches(event: KeyEvent): Boolean {
103‚Üí            // return false if Ctrl+1 is pressed and 1 is expected
104‚Üí            return shiftMatches(event) && ctrlMatches(event) && altMatches(event)
105‚Üí        }
106‚Üí
107‚Üí        private fun shiftMatches(event: KeyEvent): Boolean = shift == event.isShiftPressed
108‚Üí
109‚Üí        private fun ctrlMatches(event: KeyEvent): Boolean = ctrl == event.isCtrlPressed
110‚Üí
111‚Üí        private fun altMatches(event: KeyEvent): Boolean = altMatches(event.isAltPressed)
112‚Üí
113‚Üí        open fun shiftMatches(shiftPressed: Boolean): Boolean = shift == shiftPressed
114‚Üí
115‚Üí        fun ctrlMatches(ctrlPressed: Boolean): Boolean = ctrl == ctrlPressed
116‚Üí
117‚Üí        fun altMatches(altPressed: Boolean): Boolean = alt == altPressed
118‚Üí
119‚Üí        override fun toString(): String {
120‚Üí            val string = StringBuilder()
121‚Üí            if (ctrl) {
122‚Üí                string.append("Ctrl+")
123‚Üí            }
124‚Üí            if (alt) {
125‚Üí                string.append("Alt+")
126‚Üí            }
127‚Üí            if (shift) {
128‚Üí                string.append("Shift+")
129‚Üí            }
130‚Üí            return string.toString()
131‚Üí        }
132‚Üí
133‚Üí        companion object {
134‚Üí            fun none(): ModifierKeys = ModifierKeys(shift = false, ctrl = false, alt = false)
135‚Üí
136‚Üí            fun ctrl(): ModifierKeys = ModifierKeys(shift = false, ctrl = true, alt = false)
137‚Üí
138‚Üí            fun shift(): ModifierKeys = ModifierKeys(shift = true, ctrl = false, alt = false)
139‚Üí
140‚Üí            fun alt(): ModifierKeys = ModifierKeys(shift = false, ctrl = false, alt = true)
141‚Üí
142‚Üí            /**
143‚Üí             * Parses a [ModifierKeys] from a string.
144‚Üí             * @param s The string to parse
145‚Üí             * @return The [ModifierKeys], and the remainder of the string
146‚Üí             */
147‚Üí            fun parse(s: String): Pair<ModifierKeys, String> {
148‚Üí                var modifiers = none()
149‚Üí                val plus = s.lastIndexOf("+")
150‚Üí                if (plus == -1) {
151‚Üí                    return Pair(modifiers, s)
152‚Üí                }
153‚Üí                modifiers = fromString(s.substring(0, plus + 1))
154‚Üí                return Pair(modifiers, s.substring(plus + 1))
155‚Üí            }
156‚Üí
157‚Üí            fun fromString(from: String): ModifierKeys =
158‚Üí                ModifierKeys(from.contains("Shift"), from.contains("Ctrl"), from.contains("Alt"))
159‚Üí        }
160‚Üí    }
161‚Üí
162‚Üí    /** Modifier keys which cannot be defined by a binding  */
163‚Üí    private class AppDefinedModifierKeys private constructor() : ModifierKeys(false, false, false) {
164‚Üí        override fun shiftMatches(shiftPressed: Boolean): Boolean = true
165‚Üí
166‚Üí        companion object {
167‚Üí            /**
168‚Üí             * Specifies a keycode combination binding from an unknown input device
169‚Üí             * Should be due to the "default" key bindings and never from user input
170‚Üí             *
171‚Üí             * If we do not know what the device is, "*" could be a key on the keyboard or Shift + 8
172‚Üí             *
173‚Üí             * So we need to ignore shift, rather than match it to a value
174‚Üí             *
175‚Üí             * If we have bindings in the app, then we know whether we need shift or not (in actual fact, we should
176‚Üí             * be fine to use keycodes).
177‚Üí             */
178‚Üí            fun allowShift(): ModifierKeys = AppDefinedModifierKeys()
179‚Üí        }
180‚Üí    }
181‚Üí
182‚Üí    companion object {
183‚Üí        const val FORBIDDEN_UNICODE_CHAR = MappableBinding.PREF_SEPARATOR
184‚Üí
185‚Üí        /**
186‚Üí         * https://www.fileformat.info/info/unicode/char/2328/index.htm (Keyboard)
187‚Üí         * This is not usable on API 21 or 22
188‚Üí         */
189‚Üí        const val KEY_PREFIX = '\u2328'
190‚Üí
191‚Üí        /** https://www.fileformat.info/info/unicode/char/235d/index.htm (similar to a finger)  */
192‚Üí        const val GESTURE_PREFIX = '\u235D'
193‚Üí
194‚Üí        /** https://www.fileformat.info/info/unicode/char/2705/index.htm - checkmark (often used in URLs for unicode)
195‚Üí         * Only used for serialisation. [.KEY_PREFIX] is used for display.
196‚Üí         */
197‚Üí        const val UNICODE_PREFIX = '\u2705'
198‚Üí
199‚Üí        const val GAMEPAD_PREFIX = "üéÆ"
200‚Üí
201‚Üí        /** This returns multiple bindings due to the "default" implementation not knowing what the keycode for a button is  */
202‚Üí        fun key(event: KeyEvent): List<Binding> {
203‚Üí            val modifiers = ModifierKeys(event.isShiftPressed, event.isCtrlPressed, event.isAltPressed)
204‚Üí            val ret: MutableList<Binding> = ArrayList()
205‚Üí            val keyCode = event.keyCode
206‚Üí            if (keyCode != 0) {
207‚Üí                ret.add(keyCode(modifiers, keyCode))
208‚Üí            }
209‚Üí
210‚Üí            // passing in metaState: 0 means that Ctrl+1 returns '1' instead of '\0'
211‚Üí            // NOTE: We do not differentiate on upper/lower case via KeyEvent.META_CAPS_LOCK_ON
212‚Üí            val unicodeChar = event.getUnicodeChar(event.metaState and (KeyEvent.META_SHIFT_ON or KeyEvent.META_NUM_LOCK_ON))
213‚Üí            if (unicodeChar != 0) {
214‚Üí                try {
215‚Üí                    ret.add(unicode(modifiers, unicodeChar.toChar()))
216‚Üí                } catch (e: Exception) {
217‚Üí                    Timber.w(e)
218‚Üí                }
219‚Üí            }
220‚Üí
221‚Üí            return ret
222‚Üí        }
223‚Üí
224‚Üí        /**
225‚Üí         * Specifies a unicode binding from an unknown input device
226‚Üí         * See [AppDefinedModifierKeys]
227‚Üí         */
228‚Üí        fun unicode(unicodeChar: Char): Binding =
229‚Üí            unicode(AppDefinedModifierKeys.allowShift(), unicodeChar)
230‚Üí
231‚Üí        fun unicode(modifierKeys: ModifierKeys?, unicodeChar: Char): Binding {
232‚Üí            if (unicodeChar == FORBIDDEN_UNICODE_CHAR) return unknown()
233‚Üí            return Binding(modifierKeys, null, unicodeChar, null)
234‚Üí        }
235‚Üí
236‚Üí        fun keyCode(keyCode: Int): Binding = keyCode(ModifierKeys.none(), keyCode)
237‚Üí
238‚Üí        fun keyCode(modifiers: ModifierKeys?, keyCode: Int): Binding =
239‚Üí            Binding(modifiers, keyCode, null, null)
240‚Üí
241‚Üí        fun gesture(gesture: Gesture?): Binding = Binding(null, null, null, gesture)
242‚Üí
243‚Üí        @VisibleForTesting
244‚Üí        fun unknown(): Binding = Binding(ModifierKeys.none(), null, null, null)
245‚Üí
246‚Üí        fun fromString(from: String): Binding {
247‚Üí            if (from.isEmpty()) return unknown()
248‚Üí            try {
249‚Üí                return when (from[0]) {
250‚Üí                    GESTURE_PREFIX -> {
251‚Üí                        gesture(Gesture.valueOf(from.substring(1)))
252‚Üí                    }
253‚Üí                    UNICODE_PREFIX -> {
254‚Üí                        val parsed = ModifierKeys.parse(from.substring(1))
255‚Üí                        unicode(parsed.first, parsed.second[0])
256‚Üí                    }
257‚Üí                    KEY_PREFIX -> {
258‚Üí                        val parsed = ModifierKeys.parse(from.substring(1))
259‚Üí                        val keyCode = parsed.second.toInt()
260‚Üí                        keyCode(parsed.first, keyCode)
261‚Üí                    }
262‚Üí                    else -> unknown()
263‚Üí                }
264‚Üí            } catch (ex: Exception) {
265‚Üí                Timber.w(ex)
266‚Üí            }
267‚Üí            return unknown()
268‚Üí        }
269‚Üí    }
270‚Üí}
271‚Üí

 36‚Üíenum class ViewerCommand(val resourceId: Int) {

 76‚Üí    companion object {
 77‚Üí        val allDefaultBindings: List<MappableBinding>
 78‚Üí            get() = Arrays.stream(values())

 80‚Üí                .collect(Collectors.toList())

 83‚Üí    val preferenceKey: String
 84‚Üí        get() = "binding_$name"
 85‚Üí
 86‚Üí    fun addBinding(preferences: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding) {
 87‚Üí        val addAtStart = BiFunction { collection: MutableList<MappableBinding>, element: MappableBinding ->
 88‚Üí            // reorder the elements, moving the added binding to the first position
 89‚Üí            collection.remove(element)
 90‚Üí            collection.add(0, element)
 91‚Üí            true
 92‚Üí        }
 93‚Üí        addBindingInternal(preferences, binding, addAtStart)
 94‚Üí    }
 95‚Üí
 96‚Üí    fun addBindingAtEnd(preferences: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding) {
 97‚Üí        val addAtEnd = BiFunction { collection: MutableList<MappableBinding>, element: MappableBinding ->
 98‚Üí            // do not reorder the elements
 99‚Üí            if (collection.contains(element)) {
100‚Üí                return@BiFunction false
101‚Üí            }
102‚Üí            collection.add(element)
103‚Üí            return@BiFunction true
104‚Üí        }
105‚Üí        addBindingInternal(preferences, binding, addAtEnd)
106‚Üí    }
107‚Üí
108‚Üí    private fun addBindingInternal(preferences: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding, performAdd: BiFunction<MutableList<MappableBinding>, MappableBinding, Boolean>) {
109‚Üí        val bindings: MutableList<MappableBinding> = fromPreference(preferences, this)
110‚Üí        performAdd.apply(bindings, binding)
111‚Üí        val newValue: String = bindings.toPreferenceString()
112‚Üí        preferences.edit { putString(preferenceKey, newValue) }
113‚Üí    }
114‚Üí
115‚Üí    fun removeBinding(prefs: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding) {
116‚Üí        val bindings: MutableList<MappableBinding> = MappableBinding.fromPreferenceString(preferenceKey)
117‚Üí        bindings.remove(binding)
118‚Üí        prefs.edit {
119‚Üí            putString(preferenceKey, bindings.toPreferenceString())

125‚Üí        get() = // If we use the serialised format, then this adds additional coupling to the properties.
126‚Üí            when (this) {

136‚Üí                )
137‚Üí                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE3 -> from(
138‚Üí                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_B, CardSide.BOTH),
139‚Üí                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_3, CardSide.ANSWER),
140‚Üí                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_3, CardSide.ANSWER)
141‚Üí                )
142‚Üí                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE4 -> from(
143‚Üí                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_A, CardSide.BOTH),
144‚Üí                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_4, CardSide.ANSWER),
145‚Üí                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_4, CardSide.ANSWER)

149‚Üí                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_SPACE, CardSide.ANSWER),
150‚Üí                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_ENTER, CardSide.ANSWER),
151‚Üí                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_ENTER, CardSide.ANSWER)
152‚Üí                )
153‚Üí                EDIT -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_E, CardSide.BOTH))
154‚Üí                MARK -> from(unicode('*', CardSide.BOTH))
155‚Üí                BURY_CARD -> from(unicode('-', CardSide.BOTH))
156‚Üí                BURY_NOTE -> from(unicode('=', CardSide.BOTH))
157‚Üí                SUSPEND_CARD -> from(unicode('@', CardSide.BOTH))

159‚Üí                PLAY_MEDIA -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_R, CardSide.BOTH), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_F5, CardSide.BOTH))

163‚Üí                TOGGLE_FLAG_RED -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_1, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_1, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
164‚Üí                TOGGLE_FLAG_ORANGE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_2, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_2, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
165‚Üí                TOGGLE_FLAG_GREEN -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_3, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_3, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
166‚Üí                TOGGLE_FLAG_BLUE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_4, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_4, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
167‚Üí                TOGGLE_FLAG_PINK -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_5, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_5, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
168‚Üí                TOGGLE_FLAG_TURQUOISE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_6, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_6, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
169‚Üí                TOGGLE_FLAG_PURPLE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_7, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_7, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
170‚Üí                SHOW_HINT -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_H, CardSide.BOTH))

172‚Üí                ADD_NOTE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_A, CardSide.BOTH))
173‚Üí                else -> ArrayList()
174‚Üí            }
175‚Üí
176‚Üí    private fun keyCode(keycode: Int, side: CardSide, keys: ModifierKeys): MappableBinding {
177‚Üí        return MappableBinding(keyCode(keys, keycode), MappableBinding.Screen.Reviewer(side))
178‚Üí    }
179‚Üí
180‚Üí    private fun unicode(c: Char, side: CardSide): MappableBinding {
181‚Üí        return MappableBinding(unicode(c), MappableBinding.Screen.Reviewer(side))
182‚Üí    }
183‚Üí
184‚Üí    private fun from(vararg bindings: MappableBinding): List<MappableBinding> {
185‚Üí        return ArrayList(listOf(*bindings))
186‚Üí    }
187‚Üí
188‚Üí    private fun keyCode(keyCode: Int, side: CardSide): MappableBinding {
189‚Üí        return MappableBinding(keyCode(keyCode), MappableBinding.Screen.Reviewer(side))
190‚Üí    }
191‚Üí
192‚Üí    fun interface CommandProcessor {
193‚Üí        /**
194‚Üí         *
195‚Üí         * example failure: answering an ease on the front of the card
196‚Üí         */
197‚Üí        fun executeCommand(which: ViewerCommand, fromGesture: Gesture?): Boolean
198‚Üí    }
